EventDescriptions.EventDescription: An incoming data channel from the client with the name {subject.account.name} is initialized on host {event_src.host}
An outgoing data channel to the client with the name {subject.account.name} is initialized on host {event_src.host}
An incoming data channel from the client with the name {subject.account.name} and address {src.host} is initialized on host {event_src.host}
An outgoing data channel to the client with the name {subject.account.name} and address {src.host} is initialized on host {event_src.host}
An outgoing data channel to server is initialized on host {event_src.host}
An incoming data channel from server is initialized on host {event_src.host}
